name: Ambrosio Floor Lamp Side Table - FLL4009 - Brass - Safavieh
description: Immerse your living space in elegance with the Ambrosio floor lamp. This 61 inch brass lamp is a stunning blend of form and function. Its sleek design, featuring a glass table with a gold plated metal base, offers a sophisticated touch that complements any decor. The white linen shade provides a soft, welcoming light perfect for reading or creating a cozy ambiance. Whether placed in a living room, bedroom, or office, Ambrosio is a stylish and practical addition. The sturdy construction ensures stability, while the timeless brass finish adds a touch of glamour. Elevate your home with the allure of Ambrosio and enjoy a lighting solution that effortlessly combines beauty and utility.
